title: Tremors: Graboids and more
description: A mod that adds Graboids and all it's life cycles from the tremors franchise
body:
This mod adds graboids, Shriekers and Blasters.

For now it only has graboids

Graboid -

health- 200

attack- 20

Graboids attack by sensing vibrations. the only way to avoid it is by sneaking.

They have 3 different attacks. They can either pull you underground, spawn 3 tongues to attack or rises to the surface to attack. When graboids are underground, they are almost invulnerable except for fall damage.

The only way to avoid getting attacked is to stand on top of stone blocks.

The only way to damage a graboid is to provoke it to come to the surface. Graboids can go through doors and small spaces when underground.
